case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CORNELIUS MILLER JR.

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
DECLARATION OF SFPD OFFICER ANTRON BARRON IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2009, DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING/INJUNCTIVE RELIEF, GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER JR., CORNELIUS JUDGMENT FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF TO ABATE A PUBLIC NUISANCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS OF THE JUDGMENT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-21-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Injunctive Relief to Abate a Public Nuisance Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Tito Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Order granting application for waiver of witness testimony at prove-up hearing is in file.
After reviewing of the declarations filed with the Court, hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Cornelius Miller, Jr. for Injunctive Relief to Abate a Public Nuisance Cause by the Conduct and Activities of Defendant Cornelius Miller, Jr.
Judgment signed in open court (see scanned doc. for details of the Judgment).
